CustomField.description: When enabled, Recurring Donation value calculations (Current Year Value, Next Year Value) use the org's fiscal year instead of the calendar year. Configure in Setup > Company Settings > Fiscal Year. Only Standard Fiscal Years are supported; Custom Fiscal Years are not supported and may cause calculation errors.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use fiscal year instead of calendar year for Recurring Donation value calculations. Standard Fiscal Years only; Custom Fiscal Years are not supported.
CustomField.label: Use Fiscal Year for Recurring Donations
